Florida Lottery Mega Millions, Fantasy 5 results for July 21, 2026
St. Pete Beach parking: Business owners say higher rates drive customers away
summary: Higher parking rates at St. Pete Beach are drawing criticism from local business owners who say the increased costs are keeping visitors away. One owner has launched an online petition urging city leaders to revisit the parking policy before more businesses are affected.

title: Driver loses control of SUV before slamming into Carrollwood restaurant, 3 vehicles
summary: An SUV driver lost control and crashed into a Carrollwood restaurant Tuesday afternoon after hitting three other vehicles in the parking lot.

title: Family remembers 3-year-old victim in murder case: 'She was smart, funny, and beautiful'
summary: A Hillsborough County family is remembering a three-year-old girl after investigators say she died at the hands of her caregiver.

title: USF student creates jewelry sensor to detect drink-spiking drugs
summary: A former University of South Florida beach volleyball player is developing jewelry with a sensor designed to warn people when dangerous drugs have been slipped into their drinks.

title: Man injured in shooting at Lakeland apartment complex
summary: A man was shot at a Lakeland apartment complex Tuesday evening and was taken to a hospital with injuries that police said appear to be non-life-threatening.

title: More than 1,500 Duke Energy customers lose power in Clearwater
summary: More than 1,500 Duke Energy customers in the Clearwater area lost power Tuesday night as utility crews worked to determine the cause and restore service.

title: New invasive insect found in 16 Florida counties spreads to Polk County ranch
summary: A tiny insect recently discovered in Florida is creating a big problem for ranchers in Polk County. The rancher said he began noticing sections of pasture at Crooked Lake Ranch in Frostproof.

TSA Gold+ program: Tampa International Airport joining public-private security partnership
summary: Tampa International Airport is joining a new nationwide voluntary program that transfers airport security operations to private contractors while maintaining federal oversight.

title: News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 21
summary: Families of victims of the Surfside collapse react to a federal report on what caused the towers to fall and Gulfport residents are warned to close open permits after past hurricane damage.

title: US military identifies 3rd US service member presumed dead after Iranian attacks in Jordan
summary: A U.S. service member missing after Iranian strikes on a Jordan military base is now believed to be dead. Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad, 28, would be the 18th American killed in the Iran war.

title: Hegseth says Iran war has cost $37.5 billion as lawmakers grill him over request for more funding
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told Congress the U.S. war against Iran has already cost $37.5 billion — and the Trump admin. is asking for $80 billion more. Lawmakers on both sides aren't happy.

title: Crash blocks lanes on I-275 South near Howard Frankland Bridge
summary: A crash is blocking two left lanes on Interstate 275 South near the Howard Frankland Bridge, causing major traffic delays for drivers heading through Hillsborough County.
